title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 540.240 - Bills of indictment
text:
540.240.  Bills of indictment. — All grand juries are hereby authorized to find and present bills of indictment for either felonies or misdemeanors committed against the laws of the state.
(RSMo 1939 § 3908) 
Prior revisions:  1929 § 3519; 1919 § 3864; 1909 § 5072
